name: Young-trained donor FMT cognition study in middle-aged and aged mice
summary: Animal study testing fecal microbiota transplantation from young trained donors versus age-matched or young sedentary donors in middle-aged and aged mice, with cognitive, LTP, gut permeability, inflammatory, SCFA, and microbiome readouts.
model_system: Twelve-month-old and 18-month-old male mice receiving FMT from young trained, young sedentary, or age-matched donor mice
